title: Update dmd to version 2.0.3 🚀
body:
Hello lovely humans, [dmd](https://www.npmjs.com/package/dmd) just published its new version 2.0.3.
State Update :rocket:
Dependency dmd
New version 2.0.3
Type devDependency
This version is **not covered** by your **current version range**. Without accepting this pull request your project will work just like it did before. There might be a bunch of new features, fixes and perf improvements that the maintainers worked on for you though. I recommend you look into these changes and try to get onto the latest version of dmd. Given that you have a decent test suite, a passing build is a strong indicator that you can take advantage of these changes by merging the proposed change into your project. Otherwise this branch is a great starting point for you to work on the update. Do you have any ideas how I could improve these pull requests? Did I report anything you think isn’t right? Are you unsure about how things are supposed to work? There is a collection of [frequently asked questions](https://greenkeeper.io/faq.html) and while I’m just a bot, there is a group of people who are happy to teach me new things. [Let them know](https://github.com/greenkeeperio/greenkeeper/issues/new). Good luck with your project :sparkles: You rock! :palm_tree: --- The new version differs by 32 commits . - [`50858f0`](https://github.com/jsdoc2md/dmd/commit/50858f0c86d560f0970b973c28070c07b5b7fc1e) 2.0.3 - [`2a30410`](https://github.com/jsdoc2md/dmd/commit/2a304101f3db82ba4afa06cf01046acedfeb2ec6) remove notice - [`0950d68`](https://github.com/jsdoc2md/dmd/commit/0950d685ed340e73d9c11b3462dfac9d1e41ad7d) Merge branch 'sync' - [`845a5a8`](https://github.com/jsdoc2md/dmd/commit/845a5a8a332dff8bae2a46d199f5fda9be27d74e) deps - [`80f1ef5`](https://github.com/jsdoc2md/dmd/commit/80f1ef5db1aab6c375c87a70ff44640fa5765a97) linting - [`9555195`](https://github.com/jsdoc2md/dmd/commit/95551951034f9f6130b8c462ea5eca96cbac5e50) readme - [`0e182d4`](https://github.com/jsdoc2md/dmd/commit/0e182d46a44da24fc4b89c51c14f8bac4d2d8281) fix tests - [`1341821`](https://github.com/jsdoc2md/dmd/commit/1341821af4786134b04805d706f395e99752aa8a) fixed tests and parseLink.. docs - [`fbf5137`](https://github.com/jsdoc2md/dmd/commit/fbf5137f928b06d3c6973d6a39bd35f975ce0ae3) upgrade deps.. readme - [`115c16b`](https://github.com/jsdoc2md/dmd/commit/115c16b4c80949c0dcddcd0fec49076c75ebffe4) 2.0.3-4 - [`5e66c5f`](https://github.com/jsdoc2md/dmd/commit/5e66c5f1a81cdfbc4f19b1e2a434b6210f07584d) remove handlebars-\* deps, bringing any required helpers into the project - [`47459a9`](https://github.com/jsdoc2md/dmd/commit/47459a97944227b381271556f4538835a1bf9575) v2 prerelease notice - [`596ec56`](https://github.com/jsdoc2md/dmd/commit/596ec56898f860fc9ec0af82099f7372eb4ac957) 2.0.3-3 - [`e244896`](https://github.com/jsdoc2md/dmd/commit/e24489683383f9a733419835a0e2755013d2dd05) fix 0.10 tests - [`2e8175c`](https://github.com/jsdoc2md/dmd/commit/2e8175c06ffb098ad53ba8e634a9e1ca204ecfc1) 2.0.3-2 There are 32 commits in total.
